prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6537→5987→5650→5832→5193，整体呈波动前移趋势，2025年较2024年前移约639名，竞争明显加剧；近3年累计前移约460名，2025年基准约5193名；本省物理类计划2021年143人、2022年139人、2023年140人、2024年137人、2025年141人，基本稳定在140人左右；2026年计划149人，较2025年扩招约5.7%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第37名，近年排名稳定在35–37名区间，属全国顶尖211行列，工科实力突出；2025年声誉偏正面，投档线稳步提升（从211第14名升至第3名），入选国家卓越工程师学院，保研率逐年提升至27%；2026年声誉偏负面（实验室爆炸火灾事故），但整体关注度一般；抖音热度排名第61（一般），短视频曝光量中等。未见明显投档断档记录；力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科；航空航天类、计算机类、电子信息类等招生专业与优势学科高度匹配，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐；航空航天相关专业受国家政策支持热度上升；本省2026年普通高考总人数约474900人，较2025年（物理类+历史类约472480人）略有增加，物理类估算约267800人（较2025年266425人微增），竞争略有加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批429分较2024年448分下降，反映整体难度或分数线调整；南京航空航天大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角发达地区，对江西省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江西省招生规模较大（物理类约140人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移（竞争加剧）、2026年扩招约5.7%（缓解竞争）、本省物理类考生微增、学校声誉正面偏多、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素，考虑考生总数微增及专业热度支撑，预计2026年最低位次约5400名，区间4900–5900名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6537 → 5987 → 5650 → 5832 → 5193, showing an overall fluctuating forward trend. In 2025, it moved forward by about 639 places compared to 2024, indicating significantly intensified competition. Over the past three years, it has cumulatively moved forward by about 460 places, with a baseline of approximately 5193 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 143 in 2021, 139 in 2022, 140 in 2023, 137 in 2024, and 141 in 2025, remaining stable at around 140. In 2026, the plan is 149, an increase of about 5.7% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 37th, with recent rankings stable in the 35–37 range, placing it among the top national 211 universities with outstanding engineering strength. In 2025, its reputation was generally positive, with steadily rising admission thresholds (from 14th to 3rd among 211 universities), selection for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and a year-on-year increase in graduate recommendation rate to 27%. In 2026, its reputation is somewhat negative (due to a laboratory explosion and fire incident), but overall attention is moderate. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. It has 7 A- or higher disciplines: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, and Software Engineering A-. Its enrollment majors, such as Aerospace, Computer Science, and Electronic Information, are highly aligned with its advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular and recommended. Aerospace-related majors are gaining popularity due to national policy support. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,480 for Physics and History categories combined). The estimated Physics Category count is about 267,800 (a slight increase from 266,425 in 2025), leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch was 429, down from 448 in 2024, reflecting changes in overall difficulty or score adjustments. Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates. The university enrolls a relatively large number of students from Jiangxi (about 140 in Physics Category), making it a key source province for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward movement in rankings in 2025 (intensified competition), the approximately 5.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, the generally positive university reputation, and the high alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, and taking into account the slight increase in total candidates and support from major popularity, the minimum ranking for 2026 is predicted to be approximately 5400, with a range of 4900–5900.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Applied Physics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 4900–5900, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Electrical Engineering, Aerospace Regular Class) as your main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Chang Kong Innovation Class, Artificial Intelligence) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science, Energy and Power) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<4900), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (>5900), you should prioritize Tier 3 safety options. NUAA has strong engineering capabilities, and its advantageous disciplines such as Aerospace, Computer Science, and Electronic Information highly overlap with currently popular majors, offering high application value.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1547 → 1958 → 1722 → 2244 → 2428, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 706 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2428; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 15 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 23 in 2025, showing a year-on-year increase; the 2026 plan is only 11, a significant reduction of about 52.2% compared to 2025, indicating a sharp contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 37th on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. However, NUAA excels in science and engineering, with relatively average strength in liberal arts; the reputation in 2025 is slightly positive (increased admission scores, Excellent Engineer Plan), while in 2026 it is slightly negative (laboratory accident), but this mainly affects the psychology of science and engineering applicants; Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average), with limited exposure to liberal arts; NUAA's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Aerospace and Astronautics A-, etc.), while its liberal arts majors (Law, Accounting, Finance, English, Japanese, Administrative Management, etc.) lack corresponding A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but fierce competition; Accounting/Finance/Auditing are differentiated and wait-and-see; Foreign Languages are generally wait-and-see; the estimated number of History Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 207,000 (a slight increase from 206,055 in 2025), with slightly intensified competition; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 486 points, up from 463 points in 2024, reflecting an increase in score requirements; Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, which has strong regional appeal to Jiangxi examinees; however, the History Category enrollment scale is small (only 11 in 2026), making it a secondary enrollment category in Jiangxi.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the significant reduction of 52.2% in the History Category enrollment plan in 2026 (sharply intensified competition), the slight increase in provincial History Category examinees, and the lack of advantageous discipline support for liberal arts at NUAA, along with the slight increase in total examinees and the rise in the provincial control line, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be about 1688, with a range of 1434–1942.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 1434–1942, NUAA's liberal arts majors are few (only 6 majors with a total of 11 students in 2026). It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (English, Administrative Management) as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Law, Accounting, Finance) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Japanese, Radio and Television Studies) as a safety net. Liberal arts are not NUAA's strength, but the 211 platform plus the Nanjing region still offer high cost-effectiveness. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1434), one can focus on sprinting for Law and Accounting.
